projects.title: Emaar EBD 83 SCO Plots, Sector 83 - Gurgaon

projects.location: Emaar EBD 83 is a premium shop-cum-office plot project in Sector 83 Gurgaon with direct access from NH-8.
projects.tagline: Premium highway retail destination on NH-8 — Emaar Business District (EBD 83).
projects.description: Emaar Business District 83 (EBD 83) is a highway retail-commercial development offering premium SCO plots. Strategically located on NH-8, the project provides allowance for Basement + Ground + 4 floors and targets highway retail and nearby residential catchment.
projects.locationInfo: Right on NH-8, with high visibility to highway traffic and a strong secondary catchment from surrounding residential areas.

Flexible design for retail, office & F&B

Modern plazas like performance, gathering, fountain
